description: The Telegram coding-task long-message fix is tracked as its own harness task so future sessions can resume from the notifier/report split instead of re-debugging live chat output.
steps: Open PLAN.json and verify it only tracks the Telegram coding-task notification-shortening harness.
Open PROGRESS.md and verify the reboot entry records that notifier currently sends detailed report.summary strings to Telegram.
Confirm the scope is limited to proactive Telegram push shortening, while detailed status diagnostics remain unchanged.

description: Starting and running coding tasks use a dedicated short notification format instead of sending the full progress report to Telegram.
steps: Inspect the notifier path and verify starting or running tasks no longer return report.summary directly.
Verify the proactive Telegram message includes only compact status, repo, goal or task identity, and one short progress line.
Confirm waiting_user, failed, and completed tasks still use their existing specialized reports.

description: Notification progress extraction prefers meaningful live output or clear blockers and ignores shell prompt noise or plan-only summaries.
steps: Feed pane output containing only prompt noise and verify no new proactive progress text is selected from it.
Feed progress data with useful live output or an explicit error and verify that shorter signal is chosen for Telegram pushes.
Confirm long repo-history notes are shortened before they can reach proactive Telegram notifications.

description: Detailed status views remain unchanged so CLI status and Telegram 状态 still expose full diagnostics even after proactive push messages are shortened.
steps: Run coding-task status for an active task and verify plan progress, latest note, and live report still appear in detail.
Verify Telegram 状态 routing still returns the detailed task status payload rather than the short proactive notification format.
Confirm the long-message fix only changes background push behavior, not explicit status inspection.

description: Focused tests cover short notification building, duplicate suppression, prompt-noise rejection, and preservation of detailed status reporting.
steps: Run focused pytest coverage for notifier, progress, reporting, and coding-task routing behavior.
Verify the suite covers long-note trimming and prompt-only updates not sending new proactive notifications.
Confirm compileall still succeeds for all touched coding-task modules and tests.

description: A real active coding task such as 543a97d0 produces a short proactive Telegram-style summary while explicit status inspection still shows the full dirty history.
steps: Load a real active coding task from the workspace and build the proactive notification content through the live runtime path.
Verify the proactive content is short and no longer echoes the full repo note or plan-progress string.
Verify coding-task status for that same task still exposes the full detailed report.

description: PROGRESS.md records the root cause, new notification strategy, and validation evidence for the Telegram long-message fix.
steps: Open PROGRESS.md and verify it records why Telegram received a long message and what changed in the notifier path.
Confirm PLAN.json is fully marked complete once verification passes.
Verify the final checkpoint commit captures only this notification-shortening harness work.
